description: Self-hosted Personal DevOps Workspace Platform for Ubuntu Desktop
completedTasks: Create the complete directory structure
Initialize the Go module
Initialize Git
Create all documentation files under docs/
Create docs/PROJECT_STATE.json
Create .gitignore
Create Makefile
Create LICENSE (MIT)
Create README.md
Verify the repository builds
Implement Workspace domain model (internal/workspace)
Implement disk-backed workspace.Manager (Create/Get/List/Delete)
Implement internal/engine.Engine orchestration layer
Implement internal/config for path resolution
Implement internal/utils.NewID
Add unit tests for config, utils, workspace, engine
Verify the repository builds (Sprint 1)
Implement Template domain model and Registry (internal/template)
Seed templates/ with kubernetes, docker, jenkins, linux, terraform, ansible definitions
Add TemplatesDir to internal/config
Wire Engine.CreateWorkspace to resolve Services from a Template
Add Engine.ListTemplates / Engine.GetTemplate
Add unit tests for template.Registry; update engine tests
Verify the repository builds (Sprint 2)
Implement internal/storage.Open (SQLite, pure Go, no cgo)
Add DatabasePath to internal/config
Add SQLite index to workspace.Manager (name uniqueness, ordered List)
Update workspace.NewManager to accept *sql.DB and return error
Keep index in sync with workspace.json on Create/Delete, with rollback
Add modernc.org/sqlite dependency; go mod tidy
Add unit tests for internal/storage; update workspace/engine tests to use real SQLite
Verify the repository builds (Sprint 3)
Define shared Runtime interface and Command/Result types (internal/runtime)
Implement Shell Runtime (internal/runtime/shell) backed by os/exec.CommandContext
Fix context-cancellation vs nonzero-exit-code bug found during testing
Add unit tests for internal/runtime/shell
Verify the repository builds (Sprint 4)
Implement k3d Runtime (internal/runtime/k3d) composed over runtime.Runtime
Constrain k3d Runtime Execute to the k3d binary only
Add CreateCluster/StartCluster/StopCluster/DeleteCluster/ListClusters/ClusterExists
Add unit tests for internal/runtime/k3d using a fake runtime.Runtime
Manually verify ListClusters JSON parsing against a real k3d cluster (one-off, not automated)
Verify the repository builds (Sprint 5)
Implement Docker Runtime (internal/runtime/docker) composed over runtime.Runtime
Constrain Docker Runtime Execute to the docker binary only
Add CreateContainer/StartContainer/StopContainer/RemoveContainer/ContainerStatus/ContainerExists/ContainerLogs
Add ErrNotFound/ErrAlreadyExists classified from real docker CLI stderr text
Manually verify command shapes and error text against a real docker instance (one-off, not automated)
Add unit tests for internal/runtime/docker using a fake runtime.Runtime
Verify the repository builds (Sprint 6)
Define Service interface, Status type, ErrNotFound (internal/service)
Implement Kubernetes Service (internal/service/kubernetes) backed by a k3d cluster
Extend internal/runtime/k3d with ErrAlreadyExists and GetKubeconfig
Add unit tests composing real k3d.Runtime/docker.Runtime over a shared fake runtime.Runtime
Manually verify full Kubernetes Service lifecycle against real k3d/docker (one-off, not automated)
Verify the repository builds (Sprint 7)
notes: cmd/devlab/main.go remains a minimal entrypoint; CLI wiring is not part of any completed sprint yet. Engine intentionally does not expose Start/Stop/Reset yet (see ADR-0007); that is Sprint 10. engine.New takes (*workspace.Manager, *template.Registry); CreateWorkspace takes (name, description, templateName) and resolves Services from the Template (see ADR-0008). Template Service entries are not yet validated against a service-type catalog (see ADR-0009) — still true even with Kubernetes Service done, since one Service alone isn't a catalog; revisit after Sprint 9 (Jenkins Service). workspace.NewManager now takes (rootDir string, db *sql.DB) and returns (*Manager, error); workspace.json remains the source of truth for full Workspace data, SQLite is only a name-uniqueness/ordering index (see ADR-0010, ADR-0011). internal/runtime.Runtime (Execute(ctx, Command) (*Result, error)) is the shared contract for Shell/Docker/k3d Runtimes (see ADR-0012); no command allow-list on Shell Runtime, injection prevented structurally via argv slices (see ADR-0013). k3d Runtime and Docker Runtime are both composed over an injected runtime.Runtime and, unlike Shell Runtime, restrict Execute to their own single binary (see ADR-0014, ADR-0015). internal/service.Service (Create/Start/Stop/Reset/Delete/Status/Logs) is the shared contract for Kubernetes/Docker/Jenkins Services, with its own Status type decoupled from workspace.Status. Kubernetes Service (internal/service/kubernetes) is the first implementation, using both k3d.Runtime and docker.Runtime (see ADR-0016); k3d Runtime gained ErrAlreadyExists/GetKubeconfig as this sprint's consumer needed them (see ADR-0017). Kubernetes Service is not wired into the Engine/Workspace yet — that's Sprint 10 (Workspace Lifecycle). k3d and docker happen to be installed in this sandbox; automated tests use fakes, but the full real lifecycle was manually verified end-to-end.
